items.title: How Lemonade's Investment Income Shapes Its Financial Health
items.description: LMND's growing investment income is emerging as a critical driver of its capital-light strategy and long-term growth.

items.title: 5 Top-Ranked Stocks From the Thriving P&C Insurance Industry for 2026
items.description: Five top-ranked P&C insurers, including TRV, RNR, ALL, MCY and HGTY stand out as stronger pricing and prudent underwriting lift the industry.
